utterance:
{
  "utterance": "Why settle for a boring old to-do list when you can punch your way through your tasks? Introducing TaskPuncher, the app that lets you virtually punch through your to-do list items. It's not just a productivity tool; it's a spectacle!",
  "title": "TaskPuncher",
  "track": "T03",
  "core_insight": "TaskPuncher combines productivity with entertainment, offering a unique and memorable user experience that sets it apart from traditional to-do list apps.",
  "your_role": "Presenter / Demo"
}

{
  "utterance": "Empower elderly users to stay connected and safe with a smart home assistant that integrates emergency services and personalized companionship.",
  "title": "ElderGuardian",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "ElderGuardian uniquely combines safety features like emergency alerts with social engagement tools, addressing both physical and mental health needs of the elderly.",
  "your_role": "Project Manager and Lead Tester"
}

{
  "utterance": "Experience the future of education with a personalized learning assistant that adapts to your every need, ensuring no student is left behind in today's digital age.",
  "title": "EduGuru",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "EduGuru uses AI to provide personalized learning paths, ensuring students receive tailored educational content that addresses their specific learning gaps and styles, thereby significantly improving educational outcomes.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "Our project, 'VigilantGuard,' will revolutionize cybersecurity by providing real-time threat detection and mitigation, ensuring the safety and sovereignty of digital assets.",
  "title": "VigilantGuard",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "VigilantGuard combines advanced AI for threat detection with a robust, secure infrastructure to protect against cyber threats, addressing a critical social issue in today's digital age.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}
